# Countdown
Live countdown timer with animated digit transitions.
## Import
```tsx
import { Countdown } from "@/components/ui/countdown";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<Countdown showLabels direction={undefined} blur={undefined} delay={undefined} />
```
## Props
- **showLabels** (boolean) — default: `true`: Show labels
- **direction** (string): Direction
- **blur** (boolean): Blur
- **delay** (number): Delay (s)
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx aurora-ui-cli add countdown
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/countdown
```
